comment.text: This text appears within the Services section of the Portal Settings, specifically when a user has enabled backup services but has zero available backups. It prompts the user to top up their wallet to enable backups. Translators should ensure the language suggests a solution to resolve the "unavailable" state.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation 'Възстановяването е недостъпно' means 'Restoration is unavailable', whereas the English text 'Backups unavailable' refers to the backup files/service itself, not the process of restoration.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Резервните копия са недостъпни — попълнете портфейла

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Vähentämätön' means 'non-reducible' or 'undiminished', which is the opposite of the intended meaning 'unavailable'. The translation fails to convey that backups cannot be performed.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Varmuuskopiointi ei ole käytettävissä — täydennä lompakko

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Հեշթեվերները' is a phonetic transliteration of 'Hashtags', not 'Backups'. The correct term for backups in Armenian is 'Պահուստային պատճենները'. Additionally, 'պորտֆելիոյը' is a non-standard transliteration of 'portfolio'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Պահուստային պատճենները հասանելի չեն՝ լիցքավորեք պորտֆելը

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation 'papildiet makdienas mājokļa apmakzinājumu' is nonsensical and semantically incorrect. It translates roughly to 'top up the wallet's home payment', which does not convey the instruction to 'top up wallet' in a way that makes sense in Latvian.

The translation is nonsensical. 'Nasazdie fašímatické' is not meaningful Slovak in this context, and 'doplniť portfólio' means 'top up a portfolio' (investment context) instead of 'top up a wallet' (payment context).

The word 'Zasnimi' is a mistranslation. It appears to be a misspelling or incorrect word choice for 'Backup' (which should be 'Zalogavane kopije' or 'Shranjevanje kopij'). 'Zasnimi' is not a standard Slovenian word in this context and likely stems from a confusion with 'zasnivanje' (designing) or a similar root, failing to convey 'Backups'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Zalogavane kopije niso na voljo — napolnite denarnico

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'нима' is a misspelling/incorrect form of 'нису доступне' (are not available), and 'циљдан' is a nonsensical word in this context (likely a mistranslation of 'wallet' or a hallucination).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Резервне копије нису доступне — пополните новчаник
